query:
UPDATE teachers t
INNER JOIN users u ON t.phone = u.phone AND u.roles LIKE '%teacher%'
SET t.userId = u.id
WHERE t.isActive = 1 AND t.userId IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute UPDATE teachers t
INNER JOIN users u ON t.phone = u.phone AND u.roles LIKE '%teacher%'
SET t.userId = u.id
